title: astragalus neocarpus
intro: Astragalus neocarpus, also known as the creosote globewort, is a perennial legume plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus neocarpus are believed to include improved immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, and enhanced cardiovascular health, as well as potential anti-cancer and anti-aging effects. Astragalus neocarpus can be prepared as a herbal supplement, tea, or tincture, although further research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
